🎮 Spielbeschreibung ⤵️
Tauche ein in die bunte Welt von Roblox, wo dich unendlich viele Spiele und Abenteuer erwarten. Ob du lieber durch spannende Obbys springst, in Brookhaven mit Freunden im Roleplay lebst oder dich im Pet Simulator um süße Begleiter kümmerst – hier ist für jeden etwas dabei!
Verdiene Robux, entdecke neue Simulator-Games oder werde zum Star im nächsten Tycoon. Egal ob du mit dem Handy, am Tablet oder auf Consolen wie Xbox, Ps4 oder Ps5 spielst – Roblox ist überall dabei.
Erkunde Mini-Games, kämpfe dich durch Tower oder chill einfach mit deinen Freunden in beliebten Welten wie Adopt Me!, Bloxburg, Brookhaven, Roblox Rivals, Roblox Fishing, Grow a Garden oder Murder Mystery 2.

🎯 Zielgruppe & Kategorien ⤵️
Ideal für Kinder, Kleiner Junge & und Kleines Mädchen, Teenager und Erwachsene, die Gaming, Challenges, Pranks, witzige Stories, gruselige Erlebnisse, Real Life Videos, lustige Momente, Songs und coole Unterhaltung feiern. Es passt in viele Kategorien wie Gaming, Unterhaltung, Bildung, Musik, Tiere, Comedy sowie Film & Animation. What have you done to me?
You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away
Who will you follow?

I can't find the way out
Keep waking in the same fever dream
A cure for desire
We're playing with fire

We're drawn to light
We're broken and blinded by it
We're dying for release
If all this fear was born in my mind
I gave you everything you'll ever bе

You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away
Who will you follow then?

I feel the changes, a crack in the Matrix
Break through the lies like an axe through the screen
You can't stop desire (can't stop desire)
We are the fire

Wake up to the madness
The rats in the wall are already coming through
Lift this twisted veil from our eyes
Forever and ever

What have you done to me?
You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away
Who will you follow then?

When all your faith in reality fades away, ah
Who will you follow?

snippet.title: SHAHRAH - Ebi & Shahin Najafi
snippet.description:
In the middle of the city, in the heart of the night
One by one, we faded in hand to hand fights
At the final dinner, where the table was stained with blood
Tell my mother she shouldn’t wait for me anymore

Let my voice be the balm on the wounds of these streets
If I’m gone, pass my place to the next in line
Lay my medals at the feet of these fearless souls
Tell them what courage these children of the 2000s had

We know that hopelessness is a mistake
We stay on this path, because it’s the main road
We sing this anthem with one united voice
Together, we will build the Iran of tomorrow

The silence of the night was shattered with you
The anthem of life was written with you
Blessed are we who live long enough
To sacrifice our lives just like you

Breath by breath, our chests are filling up
In the end, the cage will finally break
Let mothers one day tell
The story of this battle in their tales

We know that hopelessness is a mistake
We stay on this path, because it’s the main road
We sing this anthem with one united voice
Together, we will build the Iran of tomorrow

snippet.title: FLYING MONKEY (Official Music Video) | BLUE MEDUSA
snippet.description:
BLUE MEDUSA – FLYING MONKEY (Official Music Video)

You’ve been asking. Here’s the answer.
This is BLUE MEDUSA - Alissa White-Gluz's new band.
🎵 Stream & save everywhere: bluemedusa.com/flyingmonkey

Directed by: Vicente Cordero and Alissa White-Gluz

🔔 Subscribe to BLUE MEDUSA: https://youtube.com/@BlueMedusaMusic

---
Flying Monkey

by Blue Medusa

Gave up your pride,
Your dignity,
For a pair of taxidermic wings.
How convenient!
When the room went crooked, you blinked.

Your palms,
Blistered from, 
Clapping for a king that,
Erased your face.
Paper halo, hollow spine… borrowed time.

Suddenly flies come to blacken the skies,
As they drink up lies and they feed on decay.
The puppeteer’s strings tangle in their wings,
And they tumble to Earth under gluttonous weight.

Flying mOnkey!
(You are not welcome here)
Fly away!
This ain’t that kind of circus,
So get back!
I won’t be another victim to your rat pack,
Enjoy your plummet.
Flying mOnkey!

Words of glass, right on cue.
You may look different now, 
But gravity recognizes you,
And it is calling you down.

I don’t walk the ground where the carrion lies, 
I don’t trace the paths of the morally grey,
Gravity bets on devotion unchecked, 
I don’t fall with the things that are born to obey.

Patience. 
This rots inwards (in words).
No one survives a favour.
Wait your turn.

Honour the dust that made you.
As it welcomes you home.
I’m not the one that betrayed you.
You should have watched where you’d flown.
---

snippet.title: KÄRBHOLZ - DÄMMERLICHT (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Unser neues Album STURM ZIEH AUF kommt am 18. September.
Vorbestellen könnt Ihr es hier:  https://kaerbholzrock.lnk.to/sturmziehauf

Muss ich mich gängigen Konventionen beugen? Muss ich meine Individualität und mein Naturell aufgeben, um in ein Raster zu passen, das andere zur Norm erklärt haben? Dämmerlicht befasst sich mit diesen Fragen und kommt zu dem Schluss, dass ein verneinen eben dieser mindestens zwei Konsequenzen mit sich bringt: Eine Menge Gegenwind, aber auch die Chance auf persönliche Verwirklichung und den Friedensschluss mit nicht zu erfüllenden Erwartungshaltungen an uns und letztendlich die Erkenntnis…wir sind genug.
